creator: naddy@mips.rhein-neckar.de
text:
The astro/setiathome port installs versions of setiathome that are
badly obsolete. If it can't be updated to use setiathome 2.0 before
the 4.0-RELEASE ports freeze then it should be marked BROKEN.

Fix: 

(Sorry, I probably won't get around to it before the freeze.)
